opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My toes feel like they are on fire when I lie down, and the only way to get a minute of peace is to hang my leg out of the bed.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe burning pain in the toes of the right foot at rest, especially lying down, for two days, causing sleep deprivation, on a background of years of calf claudication.

symptom_narrative.onset: years of exertional calf pain, with new severe rest pain in the right foot over the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: long-standing claudication; 2 days of ischaemic rest pain in the toes
symptom_narrative.character: an exquisitely sharp, burning pain in the toes at rest
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unrelenting and sleep-depriving; the only relief is hanging the leg over the side of the bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the right foot, especially the toes
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst lying flat in bed; partially relieved by hanging the leg down (dependency)
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: hanging the leg over the side of the bed (gravity)
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat and elevating the leg
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: years of reproducible calf pain on walking that used to ease with rest; now the pain is present at rest; denies sudden cold/paralysed foot
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: long-standing claudication, progressively worse over the last year, but never rest pain before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: severely compromised by pain and sleep deprivation; struggling with basic self-care

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing poor circulation/leg pain on walking (claudication)
past_medical_history.how_managed: no specific treatment; not on any blood thinners

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; immobility and sleep deprivation impairing self-care

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: desperate for pain relief and sleep; worried about his foot and coping alone

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the rest pain and dependency relief clearly

objective_data_offered.value: right foot looks pale, shiny and cool with hair loss over the toes; toes very painful and hypersensitive
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/video description; pulses and viability need clinician assessment
